MEMBERSHIP POLICY

Tier matrix

This central matrix is the source of truth for Free, Contributor, Professional, and Auditor capabilities. Admin remains a separate role, not a paid tier.

Launch access can temporarily expand Free-tier capabilities, while founder pricing rewards the first wave of Contributor and Professional members.

n/a founder / $0.00 standard

Core Theta-Space access: stream posting, groups, messages, Market and job listings, business profile, and gallery.

Group cap: Unlimited

Market listings: 6 / 14 days

Fundraisers: 0 / month

Storage: 1 GB

$1.99 founder / $4.99 standard

First 50 founding members or 180 days. Credits start at 10/mo and can grow with platform population.

Market listings: 6 / 14 days

Fundraisers: 0 / month
